calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Dlse Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-19-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration And For A Stay Of Dlse Proceedings:

Grant. No opposition filed by Respondent Ulusoy, and notice of non-opposition filed by Labor Commissioner.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
